data.body:
Goal:
Add end-to-end OpenCode approval-request support so OpenCode permission.asked events are visible to Foolery and can be correlated with the originating OpenCode session.

Verification:
1. Run `bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/approval-request-visibility.test.ts` and verify OpenCode permission.asked extraction and banner formatting pass.
2. Run relevant OpenCode HTTP/session tests and verify permission events are forwarded or preserved.
3. Run `bun run lint` and `bunx tsc --noEmit`.

Constraints:
Do not implement the UI approval buttons in this knot unless needed for a minimal API contract; keep write scope focused on OpenCode event ingestion and responder metadata.
data.title: Implement OpenCode approval support
